mapper.select: SELECT ADDRESS_NO, RECIPIENT, RECIPIENT_TEL, POSTCODE, BASIC_ADDRESS, DETAIL_ADDRESS, IS_DEFAULT, DELIVERY_REQ FROM ADDRESS WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADDRESS VALUES( SEQ_ADDRESS.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{recipient}, #{recipientTel}, #{postcode}, #{basicAddress}, #{detailAddress}, DEFAULT, #{deliveryReq}, SYSDATE, NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE ADDRESS SET RECIPIENT = #{recipient}, RECIPIENT_TEL = #{recipientTel}, POSTCODE = #{postcode}, BASIC_ADDRESS = #{basicAddress}, DETAIL_ADDRESS = #{detailAddress}, DELIVERY_REQ = #{deliveryReq}, ADDRESS_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE ADDRESS_NO = #{addressNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ADDRESS WHERE ADDRESS_NO = #{addressNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE ADDRESS SET IS_DEFAULT = 'N' WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND IS_DEFAULT = 'Y'
UPDATE ADDRESS SET IS_DEFAULT = 'Y' WHERE ADDRESS_NO = #{addressNo}
